title: Astroport - Rekt
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack exploiting a known and patched IBC vulnerability reintroduced in a June upgrade.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls IBC hooks with reentrancy vulnerabilities.

red_flags: Suspicious transactions involving large token transfers
Emergency chain halt and subsequent upgrade
summary: Astroport fell victim to a reentrancy attack exploiting a known and reintroduced IBC vulnerability, resulting in significant losses. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for reentrancy vulnerabilities in IBC hooks.
